bat.hint: If enabled, students answer questions in blocks of 2. θ is updated after each block.

bat.ready: Pool is ready for BAT mode.
bat.notReady: Pool is NOT ready for BAT mode.

Quiz.adaptiveTestingDescription: Configure how the AI adapts question difficulty to student performance.
Quiz.adaptiveModeHint: If enabled, questions will be selected dynamically based on student ability.
Quiz.precisionThresholdHint: Target Standard Error (SE). Lower values mean more precision but longer tests. Default: 0.30
Quiz.minQuestionsHint: The quiz will not terminate until this many questions are answered.
Quiz.maxQuestionsHint: The quiz will terminate after this many questions regardless of precision.
Quiz.poolAnalysisDescription: Review the quality and distribution of your question pool for adaptive testing.
Quiz.discriminationHint: Discrimination (a): How well the question distinguishes between ability levels.
Quiz.difficultyHint: Difficulty (b): The ability level at which a student has a 50% chance of answering correctly.
Quiz.distributionDescription: Frequency of student ability estimates (θ) after quiz completion.
Quiz.terminationDescription: Why adaptive quizzes ended for students.
Quiz.noQuestionUsageData: No question usage data available yet.
Quiz.driftWarning: Observed difficulty deviates significantly ({drift}) from calibrated value. Recalibration recommended.
Quiz.noAnalyticsYetDescription: Analytics will appear once students complete this adaptive quiz.

terminationReasons.precision_achieved: Assessment complete - ability measured with high confidence

errors.sessionConflict: This quiz is already in progress on another device. Please close that session first.
errors.alreadySubmitted: This quiz attempt has already been submitted.

stats.explanation: Adaptive testing selects questions that maximize information. Your final ability estimate (θ) has a 95% confidence interval of [{lower}, {upper}].

recommendations.increasePool: Increase question pool to at least 30 items for better adaptation.
recommendations.calibrateQuestions: Calibrate remaining questions to make them available for adaptive selection.
recommendations.lowDiscrimination: Some questions have low discrimination (a < 0.5) and provide little information.
recommendations.difficultyGaps: Add questions with {gaps} difficulty to better measure extremes.

warnings.insufficientPool: Question pool may be insufficient (less than 3× max questions). Accuracy may suffer.

Landing.supportBio: I Am Founder Of Easy Learning Academy And Best Selling Online Instructor Around The World. My life's mission is to help novice and professional software engineers increase their skills, make more money, and ultimately change their lives for the better.
Landing.learnByDoingDesc: Learn programming skills, from absolute beginner to advanced mastery. We create project-based courses to help you learn professionally and become a complete developer.
Landing.putYourLearningDesc: Apply your learning with real-world projects and learn everything you need to take your career to the next level.
